use_cases: Rotating image carousel for showcasing products in an orbital animation cycle
Team member gallery with smooth image transitions in a circular layout
Logo carousel for displaying client logos or brand partners
Feature highlights with animated image reveals in a central showcase area
Gallery component for creative portfolios with continuous looping imagery
ai_summary: CloudOrbit is a React component that creates an animated orbital image carousel using requestAnimationFrame and motion/react for smooth transitions. It cycles through a list of images with scale and opacity animations in a centered circular layout, supporting customizable duration, size, and styling. The component is ideal for showcasing images in a dynamic, continuous rotation on both desktop and mobile platforms.
